## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Bailey Seybolt's potential role as Technical Managing Editor at growthx.ai and explore company vision, priorities, and role expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is evolving from a service-first approach to a platform-enabled service model, balancing scalability with quality](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [The company recently raised funding and is preparing for Series B, focusing on growth and product development](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Bailey's background in writing and interest in process-oriented content creation aligns well with growthx.ai's needs](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [The role involves balancing multiple clients, strategic thinking, and leveraging AI tools to create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### Company Vision and Growth Strategy

  - [Started as a service-based approach, now moving towards a platform-enabled service model](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Focusing on solving capacity challenges while maintaining and improving quality](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Exploring adjacent services and software monetization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Preparing for Series B funding round](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Aiming for a Palantir-like model with platform use for service delivery and gradual customer exposure](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### Role Expectations and Challenges

  - [80% of role cost assigned to COGS, 20% for R\&D and product management](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Requires experimentation mindset and ability to work with evolving AI models](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Need to balance deep customer engagement with efficient time management across multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating leverage and efficiency in content delivery processes](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Goal is to embody a "best hire mentality" - becoming an indispensable asset to clients](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

### Content Operations and Delivery Process

  - [Improved customer onboarding through 8-week strategy and execution sprints](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [100% conversion rate to 12-month contracts after sprint completion in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Challenges with older accounts that didn't go through the standardized onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Focus on creating more leverage and efficiency in content delivery while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Need to balance manual work with platform improvements and strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Bailey's Career Interests and Motivations

  - [Seeking a role that combines writing expertise with strategic thinking in the AI-driven content landscape](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Interested in process-oriented work and solving scalability challenges in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Values learning opportunities and being part of building something meaningful](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Appreciates growthx.ai's commitment to quality content, as evidenced by high-caliber hires](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to sync with the team regarding Bailey's potential role](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [growthx.ai to move quickly on decision-making process](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Bailey to reach out to Marcel with any additional questions that may arise](https://fathom.video/share/7aDF_kG9xif8xCPkCUMhXXKnSzGuy3XG?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
